title: inula aestuans
intro: Inula aestuans, also known as Golden Samos or Golden Inula, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Inula aestuans include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive problems and skin conditions. Inula aestuans can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile natural remedy for various health concerns.
